title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: July 13, 2023
summary: July 13 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a higher rate of 7.36% , from the level on 07/06/2023 of 9.139 M km 2 to 8.466 M km 2 for this week.
